zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏强延续
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD维持高位震荡偏强结构，价格贴近81.8区域运行，短线多空均衡，MACD维持正值动能但未出现明确突破信号，整体偏向震荡上行

技术指标方面，MACD柱状维持正区间，动能略有扩散，短期趋势仍偏多运行，价格站稳SMA20上方，中期均线提供支撑，RSI缺失但动量未衰

支撑位关注81.39附近低点与80.80强支撑区域，上方阻力集中于82.2一线，若放量突破则打开上行空间，否则维持区间震荡运行态

操作建议以回调低吸为主，避免追高，可在81附近分批布局多单，控制风险，短线目标82.2附近止盈，跌破80.8需止损，整体保持顺势交易思路

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is currently trading in a tight consolidation phase around 81.79 USD, showing a modest 0.41% daily gain. Price action remains compressed between 81.39 and 81.89, indicating low volatility and equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The broader structure leans slightly bullish as price holds above the 20-period SMA at 81.09, suggesting short-term stability with potential for continuation if momentum expands further.

Momentum indicators present a mixed but cautiously constructive picture. The MACD stands at 0.474, indicating positive momentum, although the absence of a confirmed signal line limits precision. RSI is unavailable, so overbought or oversold conditions cannot be directly assessed. However, price holding above the SMA(20) suggests buyers are maintaining control despite muted volatility and incomplete indicator confirmation overall. Short-term momentum remains neutral-to-bullish unless MACD begins to flatten.

Key support and resistance levels show a tightly coiled market structure. Immediate support is located near 81.09 at the 20-SMA, followed by deeper support around 80.50, which would be critical if selling pressure increases. On the upside, resistance is seen at 81.90, with a breakout potentially targeting 82.50 and 84.00. These levels define the current compression zone clearly. Breakout confirmation would require sustained closes above resistance.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound strategy with selective breakout positioning. Buying near support around 81.10–80.50 offers favorable risk-reward, particularly with tight stops below 80.30 to manage downside risk. Alternatively, a breakout above 81.90 could signal renewed bullish momentum toward higher resistance zones. Traders should remain patient and prioritize confirmation over anticipation in current low-volatility conditions. Volume expansion would be key for sustained follow-through.
